name: Mexican Pheasant
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked pheasant, cut into 1-inch bites
1 package Corn Tortillas, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked pheasant, soups, onion, salsa, sour cream, and 3/4 of the cheese in a large bowl.
2. Layer the mixture with tortilla strips.
3. Top with the remaining cheese.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, turning off the heat when done.
